## Change contract

- Artifact IDs / issue:
- Version impact (`patch`, `minor`, `major`) and rationale:
- EN/FR assets affected:
- Outcomes / prerequisites affected:
- Context, apparatus, safety, or assessment impact:
- Restricted references (IDs only):

## Evidence

- [ ] Canonical and publishing validation pass, including seeded negative tests.
- [ ] I completed `curriculum/governance/review-checklist.md` and linked recorded
  facet dispositions.
- [ ] I updated claims, licenses/provenance, change log, migration/learner-impact
  notes, and offline bundle when applicable.
- [ ] I verified public source and generated outputs contain no restricted data.
- [ ] Commits include `Signed-off-by:` under DCO 1.1, and I have authority to
  contribute all included material.

## Independent approvals

| Facet | Status / reason | Approver | Evidence |

| technical |  |  |  |
| physical pilot / apparatus |  |  |  |
| safety |  |  |  |
| English |  |  |  |
